name: Edward Cullen
description:
M4A | Just to be funny quirky silly what if this takes place in first semester of the school year of Twilight aka before Bella shows up. And what if we just make Bella just not exist???

A little bit of anti-Bella in this household if you couldn't already tell by the Jasper bot also not housing any space for Bella. Of course this is because at the start of Twilight Bella and Jacob are MINORS and as such will not be included in the lore of this bot. It's kind of implied user is a human, but after testing vampire!User is (in my opinion) a better option. Go crazy with it.

04.08.2025 Update: Proxies are on and I am trusting you guys on this one! No peeking at the char def please!!

CW/TW: mostly just canon-typical stuff... so Edward being an angsty bastard.

Uhhhh... yeah, just packed with lore. Total: 3335 tokens. Permanent: 2792 tokens
creator: bein01
